description: Finex (PT Finex Bisnis Solusi Futures) is a fully regulated Indonesian forex broker established in 2012. It is supervised by BAPPEBTI and OJK through partnerships with clearing institutions such as PT KBI and the Jakarta Futures Exchange (JFX). The broker provides trading access to various instruments including Forex, Indices, Metals, Stock CFDs, and Energy with competitive trading conditions and an intuitive platform interface.

specification.leverage: Up to 1:500 (Forex & Metals; Indices/Energy may vary)

advantages: Fast execution with local bank support
disadvantages: Limited to a single live account type
Educational and research features are more basic compared to global brokers
reviewHighlights: Ideal for beginner and intermediate traders

faqs.question: Is Finex safe and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes. Finex is registered and licensed by BAPPEBTI in Indonesia.

faqs.question: What is the maximum leverage?
faqs.answer: Up to 1:500 for Forex and Metals.

faqs.question: Does Finex offer a demo account?
faqs.answer: Yes, demo accounts are available for practice.

faqs.question: What is the lowest spread?
faqs.answer: Spreads start from ±0.5 pips for the EUR/USD pair.

faqs.question: Is there an affiliate or rebate program?
faqs.answer: Yes — a partner/affiliate model is available; rebate details are discussed within the partner portal.
